## What / why

## How to test

If this needs visual validation, include **one** copy/paste command using `--test-banner`:

```bash
python -m enderterm datapack-view <pack.zip> --test-banner 'TEST: <what to look for>'
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (or explain what’s not covered)
- [ ] No secrets or local-only files committed
- [ ] If visual change: PR includes a `--test-banner` test command
